MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2013 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-16-2013 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 608, VISITING JUDGE WALLACE DOUGLASS. SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT ERIKA MARIE MASON CHOW REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE BUT THE COURT DENIED THE REQUEST. THE PARTIES WERE SENT TO FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE JUDGE PRO TEM. CASE SETTLED WITH THE JUDGE PRO TEM AS TO THE OTHER SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT KAUSTAV CHAUDHURI. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-26-2014 IN DEPT. 624, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETERMINE PREVAILING PARTY TO FIX AMOUNT OF ATTORNEY FEES AND COURT COSTS IS OFF CALENDAR. COUNSEL SPECIALLY APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER APPEARS. AS THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE ENDORSED FILED COPIES OF THE MOTION TIMELY AND DEFENDANT STATES SHE DID NOT RECEIVE A COPY OF THE MOTION, THE COURT INSTRUCTS THE MOVING PARTY TO RE-NOTICE THE MOTION. SEE MINUTES FOR DETAILS. VJ WALLACE P. DOUGLASS, CLERK: V. MACK, NOT REPORTED (D624)
